title: 'Safety concerns': US to shut Peshawar consulate in Pakistan, to shift operations to Islamabad
summary_full: The United States is closing its consulate general in Peshawar due to safety concerns for diplomatic staff and resource allocation. While the physical presence is reduced, the US will maintain engagement with Khyber Pakhtunkhwa through its embassy in Islamabad. This decision follows a wave of unrest in Pakistan.
